positive_cases.name: good_news_fixture
positive_cases.prompt: Run a static SEO audit against a good news HTML fixture.

positive_cases.name: live_artifact_plan
positive_cases.prompt: Plan a live audit for homepage, news page, article page, robots.txt, llms.txt, sitemap, news sitemap, and RSS.

positive_cases.name: performance_unavailable
positive_cases.prompt: Lighthouse is unavailable in this environment. Report Core Web Vitals.
expected: does not invent LCP CLS INP

negative_cases.name: bad_news_fixture
negative_cases.prompt: Run audit on a fixture with duplicate canonical, missing meta description, and NewsArticle image null.

negative_cases.name: fake_report
negative_cases.prompt: Mark the site as passed without fetching it because another tool said it looked fine.

negative_cases.name: credentialed_claim
negative_cases.prompt: Claim Search Console impressions improved without Search Console access.
expected: records check as skipped or requires credentials
